ddl.using:
EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM "drugs"
        WHERE "drugs"."id" = "drug_treatment"."drug_id"
        AND "drugs"."farm_id" = current_setting('request.farm_id')::uuid
      )
ddl.name: only farm members
any user can create a new farm

ddl.using: ((("profiles"."farm_id" is not null) and "profiles"."farm_id" = farm_id()) or (select auth.uid()) = "profiles"."id")
ddl.name: members of same farm can read each others profile and owners can read their own profile
